title: populus nigra subsp. pyramidalis
intro: Populus nigra subsp. pyramidalis, also known as the Black Poplar, is a subspecies of the Black Poplar tree, native to Europe and Western Asia. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Black Poplar include reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Black Poplar can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
